entities.name: VEGETABLE PIGEONPEA
entities.description: An important food security crop [Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp] grown in marginal dry areas of Kenya

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: EASTERN REGION OF KENYA
entities.description: A geographical area in Kenya where vegetable pigeonpea is an important crop and research stations are located

entities.name: CENTRAL REGION OF KENYA
entities.description: A geographical area in Kenya where the University of Nairobi Field station is located

entities.name: ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of vegetable pigeonpea genotypes to perform across different agro-ecological zones

entities.name: STABILITY
entities.description: The consistency of yield performance of vegetable pigeonpea genotypes across different environments

entities.name: KAT 60/8
entities.description: A specific genotype of vegetable pigeonpea found to be stable with wider adaptation

entities.name: MZ 2/9
entities.description: A specific genotype of vegetable pigeonpea found to be stable with wider adaptation

entities.name: ICEAP 00554
entities.description: A specific genotype of vegetable pigeonpea evaluated for yield stability

entities.name: ICEAP 00557
entities.description: A specific genotype of vegetable pigeonpea evaluated for yield stability

entities.name: KIONZA
entities.description: A specific genotype of vegetable pigeonpea ideal for yield performance and used as a reference

entities.name: AMMI
entities.description: Additive main effects and multiplicative interactions analysis used to evaluate stability and adaptation

entities.name: GGE BIPLOT
entities.description: Genotype plus genotype by environment analysis used to evaluate stability and adaptation

entities.name: KIBOKO
entities.description: A research station located in the Eastern region of Kenya

entities.name: KATUMANI
entities.description: A research station located in the Eastern region of Kenya

entities.name: KAMBI YA MAWE

entities.name: UNIVERSITY OF NAIROBI FIELD STATION
entities.description: A research station located in the central region of Kenya

entities.name: RCBD
entities.description: Randomized Complete Block design used for planting genotypes

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: The application of water using sprinklers to supplement rainfall

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: Organisms that the vegetable pigeonpea crop was protected from using chemical applications

entities.name: ALPHA-CYPERMETHRIN
entities.description: A broad-spectrum, non-systemic, pyrethroid used for pest control

entities.name: DIMETHOATE
entities.description: A chemical agent used for pest control

entities.name: ANOVA
entities.description: Combined analysis of variance used to reveal variations in G x E interactions for various traits

entities.name: G X E INTERACTIONS
entities.description: The interaction between genotype and environment affecting trait expression

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area, measured in Kg/ha

entities.name: 100 SEED MASS
entities.description: The weight of 100 seeds, measured in g/100 seed

entities.name: DAYS TO FLOWER
entities.description: The time taken from planting to the onset of flowering

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The time taken for the crop to reach full physiological maturity

entities.name: IPCA
entities.description: Interaction principal components analysis used to explain yield variation

entities.name: MARGINAL DRY AREAS
entities.description: Environmental conditions characterized by low rainfall and poor soil quality in the Eastern region of Kenya
